tagline: Localize your repo a kan kowane commit.

hero.title: Hello A Kowane Harshe
hero.lede: An fassara wannan shafin ta hanyar Mai Fassarar Albarkatu kanta, a kowane turawa zuwa main, zuwa kowane harshe da Azure AI Translator ke tallafawa.

phrases.machine_translated: Fassarar Inji ta hanyar fassarar Azure AI
phrases.open_pull_request: Buɗe buƙatun jawo tare da sababbin fassarar.
phrases.ship_anywhere: Ajiye software ɗinku a ko'ina cikin duniya.

features.reliable: Zagaye-tafiye-tafiye kowane byte na fayilolin tushen ku.
features.configurable: Tone, masana'antu, ƙamus, lalata - duk ana iya saita.
features.ci_native: An tsara shi don GitHub Ayyuka da kuma jawo-neman aiki.

footer.powered_by: Powered by Resource Translator da Azure AI Translator.
footer.view_translation_pr: Duba buƙatar jawo fassarar kwanan nan.
